sections.paragraph:
Original: אצם

Transliteration: 'ôtsem

Phonetic: o'-tsem

BDB Definition:

Ozem = "I shall hasten them"
  1. older brother of David
  2. a descendant of Judah

Origin: from an unused root probably meaning to be strong

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
